name: Daily Project Digest
description: Generate a daily summary of project activity: recent commits, open issues, and pending pull requests.
steps: Gather recent project activity. Check for recent commits, new issues, and pull request updates from the last 24 hours.
Analyze the gathered data. Identify key themes, blockers, and items that need attention.
Compose a concise daily digest report. Include sections for: highlights, new issues, PR updates, and action items.
